description_long: This is a low-profile, rectangular wooden cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front face features horizontal slats, giving it a sleek, linear appearance, while the back is plain and unadorned. The cabinet stands on four short, blocky legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. One section of the front includes a visible handle, suggesting the presence of drawers or doors for storage. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a warm, medium-brown finish that highlights the natural texture. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for use as a media console or storage unit in urban environments.
description: A modern, low-profile wooden cabinet with horizontal slats on the front and a warm brown finish. It features short legs and a visible handle for access to storage compartments.
description_view_0: Front view showing horizontal slats, two main compartments, and a visible handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, flat wooden surface and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a smooth, unadorned wooden back with no visible handles or slats.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the cabinet's depth and wood grain.
